sys_ui_action.comments:
2.7 STRY0100724 - DEV Story- Performance Improvements - Running Templates STRY0113375 - Draft from Templates Update- UI- Add "Draft Template" Action Button
v 2.5 .13 - P2 Certification Update - condition check added
This ui action will pull the data off of the form and call the method to start a template.
sys_ui_action.hint: Run a template to generate active tasks.
sys_ui_action.name: Generate Tasks
